title: erigeron acris var. serotinus
intro: Erigeron acris var. serotinus, also known as late flowering daisy or tall fleabane, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, as well as its ability to soothe digestive issues. The health benefits of Erigeron acris var. serotinus include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestive health, and boost the immune system, making it a popular choice for natural remedies. Erigeron acris var. serotinus can be prepared for medicinal use through teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat a variety of health conditions, including digestive issues and skin irritations.
